meaning: 山西(位于太行山以西、黄河中游以东);陕西(位于黄河中游)
examples: Li Yunxia, Chinese paper cutting master, was born in Shanxi Province, where paper cutting is still practiced and taught.
In Jinzhong, Shanxi Province, there is a group of people who are busy drawing maps around.
They are coming to Shanxi next week.
The plant, located in Taiyuan in China's Shanxi province, employs 79, 000 workers, Mr. Woo said.
Regardless, bragging rights for Number One go to Erdos and Inner Mongolia, with coal production outpacing Shanxi province in early 2009.
